title: A tampon
abstract: The invention relates to a tampon (100). The tampon (100) comprises a body (102) having a longitudinal axis (108), a front end (104), a rear end (106) and an outer surface (112). The body (102) comprising a liquid-absorbing material operable to absorb and/or retain bodily fluid. A bore (110) extends through the body (102) along the longitudinal axis (108) from the front end (104) to the rear end (106), said bore (110) defining an inner surface. The tampon (100) also comprises a liquid-impermeable layer (114), which comprises a liquid-impermeable elastic material and a liquid-permeable layer (116). The liquid-absorbing material is a fluid. One of the liquid-impermeable layer (114) or the liquid-permeable layer (116) is on at least a portion of the outer surface (112) of the body (102) of the tampon (100). The other of the liquid-impermeable layer (114) or the liquid-permeable layer (116) is on at least a portion of the inner surface of the body (102). In use, the liquid-impermeable layer (114) and the liquid-permeable layers (116) are operable to move between a first configuration and a second configuration.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A tampon, the tampon comprising: a body having a longitudinal axis, a front end, a rear end and an outer surface, said body comprising a liquid-absorbing material operable to absorb and/or retain bodily fluid; a bore extending through the body along the longitudinal axis from the front end to the rear end, said bore defining an inner surface; a liquid-impermeable layer, said liquid-impermeable layer comprising a liquid- impermeable elastic material; and a liquid-permeable layer; wherein the liquid-absorbing material is a fluid; wherein one of the liquid-impermeable layer or the liquid-permeable layer is on at least a portion of the outer surface of the body of the tampon and the other of the liquid- impermeable layer or the liquid-permeable layer is on at least a portion of the inner surface of the body; and wherein, in use, the liquid-impermeable layer and the liquid-permeable layers are operable to move between a first configuration and a second configuration. 2. A tampon according to claim 1 , wherein the tampon is an intravaginal tampon operable to absorb and/or retain menstrual fluid. 3. A tampon according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the tampon is operable to move forward along the longitudinal axis when a compressive force is applied to the rear end of the body. 4. A tampon according to any preceding claim, wherein the liquid-impermeable layer is on at least a portion of the outer surface of the body of the tampon and the liquid-permeable layer is on at least a portion of the inner surface of the body of the tampon in the first configuration. 5. A tampon according to any preceding claim, wherein the liquid-permeable layer is on at least a portion of the outer surface of the body of the tampon and the liquid-impermeable layer is on at least a portion of the inner surface of the body of the tampon in the second configuration. 6. A tampon according to any preceding claim, wherein the liquid-impermeable layer and the liquid-permeable layer together form a reversible sleeve. 7. A tampon according to any preceding claim, wherein the liquid-absorbing material comprises a hydrogel. 8. A tampon according to any preceding claim, wherein the liquid-impermeable elastic material has elasticity in the lateral direction and substantially no elasticity in the axial direction. 9. A tampon according to any preceding claim, wherein the bore is a substantially closed bore. 10. A tampon according to any preceding claim, wherein the tampon further comprises an insertion sleeve. 1 1 . A tampon according to any preceding claim, wherein the tampon further comprises a rear end sleeve. 12. A tampon according to any preceding claim, wherein the tampon further comprises a withdrawal element. 13. A tampon according to any preceding claim, wherein the tampon further comprises a front end sealing element. 14. A tampon according to any preceding claim, wherein the tampon further comprises an extraction sealing element. 15. A tampon according to claim 14, wherein the extraction sealing element comprises an extraction loop. 16. A tampon according to any preceding claim, wherein the liquid-impermeable layer, liquid- permeable layer, insertion sleeve, when present, and/or rear end sleeve, when present, comprise one or more transparent portion(s). 17. Use of a tampon according to any one of claims 1 -16 for absorbing and/or retaining menstrual fluid. 18. A tampon, the tampon comprising: a body having a longitudinal axis, a front end, a rear end and an outer surface, said body comprising a liquid-absorbing material operable to absorb and/or retain bodily fluid; a bore extending through the body along the longitudinal axis from the front end to the rear end, said bore defining an inner surface; a liquid-impermeable layer, said liquid-impermeable layer comprising a liquid- impermeable elastic material; and a liquid-permeable layer; wherein the liquid-absorbing material is a fluid; wherein one of the liquid-impermeable layer or the liquid-permeable layer is on at least a portion of the outer surface of the body of the tampon and the other of the liquid- impermeable layer or the liquid-permeable layer is on at least a portion of the inner surface of the body; and wherein the liquid-impermeable layer and the liquid-permeable layers together form a reversible sleeve.
